en.project_1_desc1: Led the company's e-commerce migration from OpenCart 1.5.6.4 to 3.0.3.8, covering 2,000+ SKUs and 70,000+ historical orders with zero data loss and no business interruption.
en.project_1_desc2: Wrote SQL migration scripts for data cleaning, field mapping, and relationship rebuilding across major version differences.
en.project_1_desc3: Refactored frontend code, improved mobile responsiveness, and resolved third-party module compatibility issues to improve stability.
en.project_2_title: Internal ERP System - Fuel Cell Store
en.project_2_desc1: Designed and developed an internal ERP system for order tracking, shipment monitoring, inventory management, and business reporting.
en.project_2_desc2: Built dashboards that combine order, inventory, and shipment data to support faster operational decisions.
en.project_2_desc3: Automated recurring report generation and scheduled analytics tasks, reducing manual reporting workload by about 80%.
en.project_2_desc4: Implemented scheduled backups and recovery workflows to reduce system recovery time to minutes.
en.project_3_desc1: Designed and built a full-stack inventory management system covering stock tracking, supplier management, and purchase order lifecycle workflows.
en.project_3_desc2: Created real-time analytics for inventory turnover, stock aging, and demand signals to support replenishment decisions.
en.project_3_desc3: Implemented reorder alerts based on historical sales data and safety-stock thresholds.
en.project_3_desc4: Integrated inventory data with the ERP system for real-time synchronization and reduced stockout risk.

zh.project_1_title: OpenCart 电商平台升级 - Fuel Cell Store
zh.project_1_desc1: 主导公司电商平台从 OpenCart 1.5.6.4 升级至 3.0.3.8，覆盖 2,000+ SKU 和 70,000+ 历史订单迁移，实现零数据丢失、业务不中断。
zh.project_1_desc2: 独立编写 SQL 迁移脚本，处理跨版本数据清洗、字段映射和关联关系重建。
zh.project_1_desc3: 重构前端代码，提升移动端适配，并解决多个第三方模块兼容性问题，增强系统稳定性。
zh.project_2_title: 内部 ERP 系统 - Fuel Cell Store
zh.project_2_desc1: 设计并开发企业内部 ERP 系统，覆盖订单追踪、发货监控、库存管理和业务报表。
zh.project_2_desc2: 构建统一数据看板，整合订单、库存和发货数据，支持更高效的运营决策。
zh.project_2_desc3: 实现自动化报表生成和定时分析任务，将人工统计工作量减少约 80%。
zh.project_2_desc4: 通过定时备份和恢复流程设计，将系统异常恢复时间缩短至分钟级。
zh.project_3_title: 库存管理系统 - Fuel Cell Store
zh.project_3_desc1: 设计并实现全栈库存管理系统，覆盖库存追踪、供应商管理和采购订单全生命周期流程。
zh.project_3_desc2: 构建实时分析能力，整合库存周转、库龄和需求信号，为补货决策提供依据。
zh.project_3_desc3: 基于历史销售数据和安全库存阈值，实现智能补货提醒。
zh.project_3_desc4: 与 ERP 系统集成，实现库存数据实时同步，降低缺货风险。
